overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character walking along a countryside path toward Hogwarts castle. The character traverses a natural landscape featuring stone walls, a wooden signpost, and tall grass fields under a partly cloudy sky, eventually climbing over a wall into an open meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined forest trail with stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant castle, passing a wooden lamp post on the right

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
muddy dirt trail with puddles winding through the forest
low moss-covered stone wall running alongside the path
tall wooden post with a lantern mounted on top
hazy mountain range visible in the background
large gothic castle with multiple spires emerging from behind the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and a stone wall. A wooden lamp post stands on the right side of the path as Hogwarts castle becomes visible in the distance through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: opening in forest with clear view of castle

events.description: a traveler in a hat passes by on the left walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the castle becomes more prominent in the center of the view

notable_agents.action: traveler wearing a hat and suspenders walking past the camera toward the background

segments.scene_description: The path opens up providing a clearer view of Hogwarts castle ahead. Another traveler passes by on the left walking in the opposite direction. The stone wall continues on the left while the forest thins slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural crossroads with wooden signpost structure

events.description: passing the wooden signpost structure with directional signs pointing various ways

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking past the wooden signpost, continuing along the stone wall

entered.detail: small wooden building with mossy roof containing a notice board
wooden signpost with multiple directional arrows pointing to various locations

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden signpost structure at a crossroads, passing by the moss-covered notice board and directional signs. The stone wall now runs along the right side of the path, and Hogwarts castle shifts to the right side of the frame as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grass field with stone wall boundary

events.description: character climbs over the stone wall into the tall grass field

agents.ego_description: climbing over the stone wall and proceeding through the tall grass toward a distant stone bridge

entered.detail: field of tall green grass swaying in the wind
stone arch bridge visible in the distance across the field

segments.scene_description: The character climbs over the stone wall into an open field of tall grass. Hogwarts castle remains visible to the right while a stone bridge appears in the distance ahead. The environment transitions from the enclosed trail to an open meadow with mountains in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that gradually opens from a forested path into a wide, mountainous meadow. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and a stone wall, with Hogwarts castle appearing as a distant silhouette through the foliage. As the forest thins, the path widens to provide a clearer view of the castle while another traveler passes by in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts toward a wooden signpost and moss-covered notice board at a crossroads, where the path curves and the stone wall moves to the right side of the frame. Finally, the character climbs over the wall, transitioning from the enclosed trail into an open field of tall grass with a stone bridge and distant mountains unfolding under the sky.
